explanation_used:
1. **Opening statement**: This neuron strongly responds to **proper nouns embedded in detailed narrative or reportive contexts** (such as named individuals with titles in news reports, specific organizations/teams in event descriptions, or geographic locations within operational accounts).

2. **Domain coverage**: The pattern appears across multiple languages (Finnish, German, English, Russian, Italian, Polish, Spanish, Turkish, etc.) in formal or journalistic prose covering sports, military/defense operations, political/legal actions, disaster reports, and cultural events. The texts are typically mid-sentence excerpts where the proper noun is part of an ongoing description of actions, statements, or logistical details.

3. **Contrast with low-activation examples**: The low-activation texts often also contain proper nouns (e.g., "NASA," "Andrej Babiš," "Etna"), but these are usually presented in simpler, lead-style phrases or headlines without the surrounding narrative elaboration. The high-activation snippets consistently place the proper noun within a clause describing a specific activity, quotation, or procedural detail (e.g., "U.S. Vice Admiral John Aquilino, deputy chief...", "Sakaryaspor tribünlerinden..."), whereas low-activation examples list entities without such embedded narrative action.

4. **Closing interpretation**: The neuron detects proper nouns—particularly persons, organizations, and locations—when they are syntactically and semantically integrated into a detailed, event-driven narrative. It functions as a filter for entity-rich reporting rather than mere entity mentions.

results.actual_text: ines visit the instate-rival Michigan State Spartans: Remember the all-time wacky blocked-punt-return-for-a-TD finish last year that put a dagger
results.plain_text: Welcome to the real season! That time of the NCAA football campaign when the wins or sins of a team’s past are measured against others like no weekend before.  With the year’s first official rankings set to drop Tuesday night, contenders are heavily scrutinized while pretenders are simply shoved aside in a debate by 12 football giants known as the College Football Playoff selection committee to determine the list of the only top 25 that truly matters.  Heading in to the days ahead, only one thing is for certain in the college pigskin world …  And that’s No. 1.  The Alabama Crimson Tide will remain the rightful holders of NCAA football’s top rating when the committee’s first College Football Playoff Rankings are released. There will be no timely upset of the top-ranked Tide. No shooting themselves in the foot, the only way it seems they’ve been beaten in the last decade.  That’s because the defending college pigskin champions get a timely bye amid a handful of games against heavy-duty SEC competition.  So there’s Alabama as a lock atop the CFP Rankings.  But what follows in the chase for the other coveted final-four berths to determine the other CFP semifinalists makes for captivating conversation.  It’s already interesting given the shocking loss by the Ohio State Buckeyes to the unsteady Penn State Nittany Lions last Saturday night. The overwhelming choice to suck up the No. 2 spot — and remain as top challenger to the Tide’s title — has dropped out of the top four thanks to that Week 8 loss in Happy Valley.  But it just so happened to act as an appetizer for what could truly be a game-changing weekend for the CFP rankings.  Check out the pivotal CFP-deciding tilts on a wild Week 9 slate …  • The No. 2 Michigan Wolverines visit the instate-rival Michigan State Spartans: Remember the all-time wacky blocked-punt-return-for-a-TD finish last year that put a dagger in Michigan’s hopes and kept Sparty alive on a run to the final four? Anything can happen — already has — in this rivalry game, and with Ohio State’s loss, Michigan is now firmly in the Big Ten driver’s seat. So it’s Go Blue that’s got everything to lose.  • The No. 3 Clemson Tigers visit their nemeses, the No. 12 Florida State Seminoles. In the Dabo Swinney era, Clemson is 3-5 against FSU in a meeting of ACC powerhouses that always seems to determine the conference champion and a final-four combatant. The good news for Clemson, who takes a big hit with a loss here, is that it’s coming off a bye-week.  • The No. 4 Washington Huskies visit the No. 17 Utah Utes. This Pac-12 tilt has never carried any meaning … until now. And boy, this is big for Washington in its bid to make the CFP. UDub has been blowing away powerhouse programs in its somewhat surprising run, but Utah represents an unheralded squad which has a habit of doing damage to ranked contenders.  SECOND DOWN  Four other games could help heavily shake up the first CFP rankings in Week 9: No. 5 Louisville at Virginia (should be an easy one for Heisman front-runner QB Lamar Jackson, but Virginia is out to replicate Duke’s near-upset of Louisville); Northwestern at No. 6 Ohio State (How’s OSU’s confidence up against a suddenly red-hot Northwestern crew?); No. 7 Nebraska at No. 11 Wisconsin (we know Wiscy is for real, but the jury’s still out on Nebraska); and No. 8 Baylor at Texas (just when you think you’ve figured out both Big 12 teams, they’ll go ahead and throw a wrench into trends) … Tough to understand how QB J.T. Barrett couldn’t lead Ohio State to an easy victory over Penn State, especially after holding a two-touchdown lead in the fourth quarter. Kinda taints Barrett’s shot at earning the Heisman Trophy, doesn’t it? … How’s this for a trio of troubled traditional winners? Notre Dame (2-5), Texas (3-4) and Oregon (2-5) are a combined 7-1.  THIRD DOWN  USA Today reports that 20 coaches are making at least $4 million a season, up from four five seasons ago. So is that a sign of an improved financial picture in college football or the makings of shift in philosophy that coaches are more important in the game? BTW: Michigan’s Jim Harbaugh is No. 1 at $9 million per, says USA Today … Speaking of coaches, nice to see Steve Spurrier embracing retirement by starring in Dr. Pepper ads with that mega-weird soda vendor. A little levity from the Head Ball Coach looks good on the legendary gridiron guru … Wonder if Spurrier will be at the World’s Largest Outdoor Cocktail Party, which goes Saturday between his old school, Florida, and visiting Georgia. Always a good time, we’re told — and usually a good game at Tallahassee, Fla. But really, can a bash go wrong with a moniker like that? Lovin’ that cbssports.com is calling it the World’s Largest Outdoor Punt Party given the anemic offences of both squads.  FOURTH DOWN  Is there a better QB name in football than Cincinnati’s Gunner Kiel? The fifth-year pivot is back in the news after regaining his starter status following being displaced for a season-and-a-half. Can’t help thinking with a handle like that, he should be the quarterback at Air Force … Auburn gets RB Kerryon Johnson (ankle), the starter at the beginning of the year, back to face SEC-rival and host Ole Miss … Game-time decision for Boston College QB Patrick Towels (hamstring) against host NC State … How about those workout shirts for Louisville paying tribute to a local legend? They have the words ‘Muhammad Ali’ stitched on the front and either ‘Float like a butterfly,’ for the offensive players, or ‘Sting like a bee,’ for the defensive players, stitched on the back. Awesome tribute.  tsaelhof@postmedia.com  On Twitter: @ToddSaelhofPM

results.actual_text: osofar hasta altas horas de la madrugada. Buscador incansable, audaz, entusiasta, falto de tacto,
results.plain_text: Los astros y vos  Horóscopo Sagitario de hoy, 30 de octubre de 2020: las predicciones para la salud, el amor y el dinero  Enterate qué dice el horóscopo de hoy para los nacidos entre el 23 de noviembre y el 22 de diciembre en este día de la semana.  Horóscopo de hoy Conocé las predicciones y qué le depara el horóscopo a Sagitario este viernes 30 de octubre de 2020 en cuestiones de salud, amor y dinero.  A Sagitario es súper compañero y optimista, de espíritu aventurero, al que le encantan los viajes y filosofar hasta altas horas de la madrugada. Buscador incansable, audaz, entusiasta, falto de tacto, es graciosamente torpe y “mete-pata”. No tiene filtros al hablar: puede decirnos las peores cosas con total frescura, tal vez ni siquiera haya reparado en la fuerza de sus palabras. Odia la rutina, es un excelente compañero de viajes y aventuras ya que para un Sagitario no existen fronteras físicas ni mentales. Ama la libertad. Qué le espera a Sagitario el viernes 30 de octubre  Estarás comunicativo y atento a la suerte. El amor te esquiva. Espera tu turno en el reparto del destino. Salud: Te quejas de la situación en que vives sin ponerte a pensar que eres el responsable de no realizar cambios para mejorar tu calidad de vida. Amor: Si estás en crisis, deberás resolverla con rapidez y al menor costo posible. Ponte en el lugar de tu pareja y actúa con madurez. Dinero: Conciliar es la consigna. Si el entorno se muestra hostil, ten paciencia. Salvarás el mes con un acierto comercial inesperado. Sagitario es el noveno primer signo del zodíaco. Su elemento es el fuego, al igual que el de Aries y Leo. Pertenecen al signo de Sagitario las personas nacidas entre el 23 de noviembrey el 22 de diciembre. Consultá el horóscopo para todos los signos del zodíaco.

results.actual_text: the e-KshatiPurti portal through the Meri Fasal Mera Byora website on August 2, Haryana Chief Minister Manohar
results.plain_text: Haryana villagers:- Hoping for a good harvest, Ramesh Kumar (45) of Bhatia village in Haryana sowed wheat and paddy on 10 acres of land by spending close to Rs 1 lakh. However, floods in River Ghaggar ruined the crops two months ago, leaving him in debt and without any alternative source of income. "I lost my house and all other possessions to the flood. I am worried about my children's future, their education. I have no other income to take care of my family. Everything is gone,” he bemoans. Kumar is among the hundreds of farmers who have suffered losses in the floods that washed away over four lakh acres of agricultural lands and destroyed close to 500 houses in 12 districts of the state, affecting over 1,500 villages. “Yamunanagar, Karnal, Palwal, Kurukshetra, Panipat, Sonipat and Sirsa are among the affected districts, leaving farmers to grapple with losses exceeding Rs 55 crore,” said Puran Dahiya, a local farmer engaged in relief work with NGO Jansamvedna. Residents in Kaithal district, around 200 km from Delhi, were affected by the flooding of Hansi-Butana canal. “The floods in this particular region were preventable but for the administration’s negligence,” said Vishpal Singh, a farmer from Sherpur village in Purab block. “Initially, the water levels were at 18 ft. It touched an alarming 28 ft on July 18. Had the canal been properly maintained, the villages on this side could have been saved," he said. The farmers have been demanding a compensation of Rs 50,000 per acre for agricultural lands. However, the government has announced only Rs 15,000 per acre for full crop damage. The farmers have been seeking compensation for livestock loss, damaged borewells, Rs 10 lakh per family for the bereaved, one-year waiver of all debts and interests and minimum support price for their produce. However, none of these demands has been accepted so far. Hiccups all the way Launching an extended version of the e-KshatiPurti portal through the Meri Fasal Mera Byora website on August 2, Haryana Chief Minister Manohar Lal Khattar announced compensations of up to Rs 50 lakh for loss of movable property and Rs 25 lakh for immovable property. The money would be received in the bank accounts of farmers. However, the complicated process of applying for compensation and lack of easy access to the internet have been causing problems. The farmers had to register their details on the compensation portal or the Meri Fasal Mera Byora portal and submit proof of crop damage, including photographs, videos or revenue records, which many of the farmers were not adept at providing. They are still awaiting the verification and approval of their applications by the concerned authorities, which may take a long time or be subject to corruption or negligence. They also face the possibility of receiving less than the promised amount or not receiving it at all due to various reasons, including lack of funds, bureaucratic hurdles or political interference. As per the latest data from the government, 47 farmers from across the state have uploaded necessary information and 40 of them have received the compensation. When contacted, neither the bank staff nor the concerned government authorities were ready to speak on the issues related to delays in providing compensation and complications in applying for the same. "The portal is very slow and it crashes quite often. I had to upload many documents and proofs related to my land and crop damage. It took me several days to complete the application process. I have not received any confirmation or status update from the authorities yet. I do not know when I will get the money," said Rajesh Kumar (38) from Khambeda, who lost paddy, maize and vegetables cultivated on his six acres to the flooding. Ramesh also had a similar experience. "I have not heard back from the authorities. I do not even know if I will get the compensation. But I will fight for what is mine, even if it means giving up my life," Ramesh said. A local internet cafe owner at Cheeka in Kaithal district told 101Reporters on condition of anonymity that the farmers from several villages without electricity and internet access had frequented his cafe every day to fill up online forms for compensation. "I know they are in a dire situation and it pains me to charge them Rs 50 per hour, but I too have to earn my living," he said, adding that he helped around 1,000 farmers to apply for compensation in a single month. "The farmers told me that even in this situation the government officials are seeking bribes from them to expedite their claims," the cafe owner said. Waterborne diseases pose risk The floodwater did not recede for several days, with the Ghaggar staying above the danger mark of 24 ft. However, after some time, the situation became better. However, as a 500-km road stretch was washed away, access to markets and basic services have been affected. The process of rebuilding it is going on at present. In July, the district administration established 341 camps and provided water tankers to ensure clean drinking water to the locals. The medical team did health check-ups of over 6,000 individuals and distributed over 1,000 relief packages. However, such measures have been falling short as the number of affected people have increased since then. A woman from Bhatia village told 101Reporters on condition of anonymity that her family have been living in a makeshift tent on a slightly elevated part of their land from the day floods submerged their house. "We have to walk for miles to get drinking water from a nearby village. The water in our taps is dirty and smells bad. We have no electricity, work and food. We have not received relief packages. The authorities have also failed to send water tankers," she said. Locals have been falling sick as stagnant water breeds mosquitoes and gives rise to water-borne and vector-borne diseases. "For the last two days, my neighbour's son is suffering from high fever and vomiting. He might have cholera. We are scared to even go to the hospital because we do not know if they will treat us properly," said a resident of Khambeda village, on condition of anonymity. Officials at the local health centres said many people were falling sick with diarrhoea, fever, and skin and eye infections, but they could not give exact figures. According to a newsreport, Haryana recorded 772 dengue, 43 chikungunya and 35 malaria cases till August 23, with most of the cases coming from Rohtak, Yamunanagar, Rewari and Gurugram. The health department is coordinating with the local administration to fog the areas to kill mosquitoes, and are organising medical camps and distributing medicines and chlorine tablets to prevent the spread of diseases. 101Reporters/SP

results.actual_text: "Esta lista de cosas he observado que le hace el bullying a la gente".
results.plain_text: "Esta lista de cosas he observado que le hace el bullying a la gente". De esta forma empezaba una usuaria de Twitter un hilo que se ha convertido en viral sobre sus experiencias tras haber sufrido acoso escolar.  Una consecución de tuits que llevan ya más de 1.200 retuits en apenas unas horas y en los que explica qué siente una persona que sufre este tipo de acoso.  Merece la pena leerlo para entender lo que sufren muchos jóvenes cada día.   A los de "el bullying te ayuda a fortalecer el carácter", esta lista de cosas que he observado que le hace el bullying a la gente: — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  -Desconcierto total de por qué te están haciendo esto.  — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017    -Convicción de que es porque te lo mereces. Porque eres muy frío, o muy pesado, o muy tonto, o muy aburrido, o muy raro. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  -Decisión de que debes cambiar tu forma de ser. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  -Cuando pasa el tiempo y no funciona, conclusión de que hay algo en tu persona que la hace intrínsecamente incapaz de ser amada, así que te tienes que resignar. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  -Ataques de ansiedad cuando ves a la gente que te ha hecho bullying, o cuando oyes su voz, o cuando te parece que les has visto al fondo de la calle. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  -Ataques de ansiedad cuando te cruzas con un grupo grande de niños o de adolescentes por la calle, porque te recuerdan a los que te hicieron bullying. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  -Llegar a pensar que literalmente tiene que haber algo en ti que te hace invisible, porque no es normal que hayan pasado meses desde la última vez que alguien de tu clase pareció percatarse de tu presencia. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  -Después de tanto tiempo deseando DESESPERADAMENTE que alguien te hable, cuando alguien te habla ¡sorpresa! ¡Ansiedad! No te acuerdas de cómo se hablaba con la gente, te pones nervioso y acabas rehuyendo cualquier contacto para volver a tu burbuja. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  Porque tu burbuja es solitaria y deprimente, pero al menos ya estás acostumbrado a ella y es mejor que tener que pasar por el nerviosismo de que te hablen. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  -Autoconvencerte de tu propia condescendencia, de que te crees superior a los demás, cuando en realidad es el típico despreciar porque te sientes despreciado. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  -Suprimir tus propios sentimientos. Así. Nunca te sientes desplazado, ni intimidado, ni nervioso, ni inseguro. Ni anhelas nada. Nada te interesa realmente, para bien o para mal. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017 P.D.: En realidad sí, pero no te lo confiesas ni a ti mismo.  -Incapacidad de sentirte parte de un grupo, o cómodo dentro de un grupo, por un tiempo prolongado. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  (Nótese que aquí ya tenemos amigos, ya se ha acabado el problema, fin de la pesadilla. Update: no)  -Convicción de que a tus amigos en realidad les caes mal. A todos. Eres muy borde, o muy aguafiestas. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  -Convicción de que, si no estás solo ahora, es porque vas a quedarte solo dentro de muy poco.  -Sensación de que eres incapaz de ser tú mismo cuando estás rodeado de gente. Cada vez que hablas en voz alta pierdes el control de tus pensamientos, y así dices cosas que te hacen quedar como un imbécil o un capullo. Otra vez ganas de no abrir la boca nunca más. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  -Por todas las anteriores, miedo constante a perder la amistad de la persona. Le pides perdón por cualquier cosa, le preguntas (si te atreves a preguntárselo) si os habéis distanciado porque parece que lleváis dos semanas hablando "menos que antes". — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  Pues nas, por ahora los superpoderes cósmicos de nivel 10 que te da haber sufrido bullying no aparecen por ninguna parte. Seguiremos informando. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  Por cierto, incluso aunque a alguien le haya hecho más fuerte el bullying (yo no le conozco, pero puede existir, quién sabe), ¿eso quiere decir que le tenemos que dar las gracias a los abusadores? — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  Me disparas pero esquivo la bala, así que ¡gracias por no conseguir tu propósito de matarme! — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  Aunque el bullying enseñase a la víctima a ser más fuerte, el agresor seguiría siendo un puto agresor. Su intención no era hacerle más fuerte, era aprovecharse de él. Otra cosa es que no le saliese la jugada. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  Y basta de lo que le enseña al abusado. ¿Qué le enseña al abusador? Que puede machacar y exprimir a la gente para sacar poder social, autoestima. Y no está mal. Total, si nadie les castiga no puede ser tan malo. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  Y la víctima no va a castigarles porque no puede, y la autoridad no va a castigarles porque ¡si le está haciendo un favor al chiquillo! ¡Mira cómo aprende a ser más extrovertido y seguro de sí mismo, gracias a que le maltraten, aislen y demuestren que está totalmente desarmado! — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  Ah, otra para la lista: — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017 -Creerte totalmente desarmado. Y lo mejor de esta es que es verdad.  Te atacan cuanto quieren y no puedes protegerte de ninguna manera, ni nadie puede (ni tampoco es que quiera, por lo general) hacerlo por ti. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  Por cierto, si ves a una persona que sufre bullying y sientes el deseo de aconsejarle que "ignórales, ya se aburrirán", antes sigue estos pasos: — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017 1. Toma aire. 2. Tírate por la ventana.  Pues eso, que yo ahora mismo me considero bastante feliz y hay un par de cosas buenas que han salido de esa etapa de bullying, pero son cosas que hice YO ante esa situación. No lo hicieron los que me maltrataron. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017  Así que si a alguien hay que dar las gracias es a MÍ. Y a la suerte de que he sufrido poco, dentro de lo que cabe, porque si hubiese sufrido lo que otra gente, no sé qué sería de mi vida. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017 Sugiere una corrección Pero esa gente es muy fuerte. Pero porque lo son, no porque los capullos del mundo se lo hayan regalado cual don divino. — Barb🎃ssa (@FenixIgnifugo) 8 de noviembre de 2017

results.actual_text: Лекари спасиха родилка и бебето й
results.plain_text:
Лекари спасиха родилка и бебето й във Варна 18.03.2019 09:25; Лиляна Трънкова Лекари от МБАЛ „Света Анна – Варна“ спасиха млада жена в напреднала бременност и направиха възможно раждането на бебето й – живо и здраво, въпреки непостигнатата пълна зрялост и тежкото общо състояние на майката. В екипа, дарил с най-голямото щастие – майчинството, 30-годишната Димка от Лудогорието се включиха началникът на „Родилно“ отделение на варненския „Пирогов“ д-р Милко Папазов, началникът на отделението по анестезиология, реанимация и интензивно лечение д-р Валентин Власаков и шефовете на клиниката по гинекология проф. Явор Корновски и на отделението по гастроентерология д-р Нестор Мерджанов. Събирането на мултидисциплинарния екип се оказало наложително миналата седмица, след като бременната в 34-та гестационна седмица жена потърсила помощ в МБАЛ „Света Анна – Варна“ в тежко състояние и в реална заплаха за живота, включително – и на бебето.  Медиците установили, че 30-годишната Димка, освен в напреднала бременност, е с неалкохолна чернодробна цироза, диабет и асцит (наличие на сериозно количество течност в стомаха). Тежката и сложна клинична картина се оказала причина жената да бъде лекувана консервативно в няколко лечебни заведения. Състоянието й междувременно се усложнило и тя била приета по спешност в МБАЛ „Света Анна – Варна“, изпълнена с отчаяние и страх, че няма да прегърне първата си рожба, чакана три години и предшествана от две загубени бебета. Специалистите от спешната болница на Североизточна България взели решение да пристъпят към радикални мерки, за да спасят живота и здравето както на майката, така и на бебето. В резултат на серия интервенции от корема на младата жена са източени литри течност, а бебето е извадено и поставено в кувьоз и под наблюдение на специалистите в отделението по неонатология в болницата. 30-годишната Димка е изписана преди края на работната седмица, а малкият й син Васил остава под наблюдение в отделението по Неонатология, докато достигне тегло, безопасно за изписване и отглеждане в домашна обстановка.  
                                
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                     Жена скрила накити за 3 бона в жабка на кола твърди, че са й откраданти  
                                
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                     Григор започва "Мастърс"-а в Маями като 29-и в света  
                                
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                     Астероид ще премине на 305 хиляди километра от Земята  
                                
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                     Пощенски гълъб беше продаден за 1,25 милиона евро на търг  
                                
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                     Издирват дете на 2 години от бургаското село Равнец от снощи  
                                
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                     Гърция кипи след "Измир! Ти, който хвърляш гяурите в морето" на Ердоган
